Description: A user can set up suppliers and also release or control payments, creating a fraud and unauthorized disbursement risk.
A user can process invoices and also release payments, enabling end-to-end control over a financial disbursement flow.

Policy_Name: Supplier Setup and Invoice Entry Conflict
Description: A user can create or manage supplier setup activities and also initiate invoice processing, reducing independent review in procure-to-pay.
A user can influence revenue activity and also make credit-related decisions, increasing the risk of unauthorized commercial adjustments.

Policy_Name: Directory Provisioning and Admin Control Risk
Description: A user can support or provision directory access and also hold privileged directory administration rights.
A user can assign access and also approve or administer powerful access, allowing self-elevation or unreviewed escalation.

Policy_Name: Recruiting and Worker Exit Manipulation Risk
Description: A user can participate in recruiting activities and also control worker termination or status maintenance processes.

Policy_Name: HR Administration and Payroll Control Risk
Description: A user can maintain sensitive HR worker actions and also administer payroll-related functions.

Policy_Name: HCM Superuser and Data Movement Risk
Description: A user can administer the HCM platform and also control data movement, integrations, or audit-heavy functions.
A user in an operational support role also holds privileged directory administration access.
A user with broad directory authority also holds payment-release or credit-sensitive financial access.
A user can perform sensitive financial actions and also assign or approve enterprise access.
A user can influence recruiting outcomes and also provision or administer directory access.
A user can control payroll-related activities while also holding privileged directory administration access.
A user holds broad HCM platform administration together with sensitive financial or privileged directory access.
